title: Grilled Spring Chicken with Filipino-Style BBQ Sauce
description: A fusion twist on traditional grilled chicken, marinated in a sweet and savory Filipino-style BBQ sauce. Perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: 1. Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
2. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry with paper towels.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the BBQ sauce and spring oil.
4. Brush the chicken with the BBQ sauce mixture, making sure to coat it evenly.
5. Season the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Place the chicken on the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F.
7. Transfer the chicken to a plate and let it rest for a few minutes.
8. Garnish with spring onions and serve hot.
